This PR adds a new post/feature. For preparing a post, please see the instructions [here](https://github.com/starformationnews/website#preparing-a-post).

## Checklist

- [ ] This branch is named following [branch naming rules](https://github.com/starformationnews/website#preparing-a-post).
- [ ] I have double-checked that the frontmatter on my posts is correct (date, authors, etc.)
- [ ] **For now**: please make sure that `hidden: true` is set in the frontmatter on new newsletters, so that we can do a final check with João after it merges.
- [ ] Every post has an attached image in .webp format that is no larger than 2000 pixels in any dimension.
- [ ] I have checked that the site successfully builds on my machine, using `npm run build`.
- [ ] I previewed the built site with `npm run preview`, and I checked that:
    - [ ] 1. All new articles display correctly
    - [ ] 2. Existing articles display correctly
    - [ ] 3. No links or menu items are broken
     
Let an SFN admin know once the above list is complete.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> If your new post is a **monthly newsletter**, please make sure that the mailing list owner (currently: João) sends an email about the new SFN once it is merged.
